tooltip.emi.bom.batch_size:
Batch size: %s
Scroll to adjust
Hold §6[shift]§r to adjust by 16
tooltip.emi.bom.help:
The recipe tree shows the process and base cost of a recipe
The display can be panned and zoomed

Left click a node to choose a recipe to assign to it
Hold §6[shift]§r to automatically pick based on your inventory

Right click a recipe node to fold it temporarily
Hold §6[shift]§r to clear the recipe

The initial tree state is controlled by default recipes
A button next to recipes can set default recipe preferences

The toggle by total cost can be used to help craft a recipe tree
While crafting, materials that need to be collected will be displayed
§bSynthetic favorites§r will be added to the favorites sidebar that
will show incomplete steps and can be used to craft
tooltip.emi.bom.mode.craft:
§6Crafting§r recipe tree
Progress will be shown in recipe tree
§bSynthetic favorites§r added to sidebar
tooltip.emi.config.global: Toggle using a global EMI config between all game instances instead of a separate config per game instance
tooltip.emi.default_resolution: Click the §6recipe default button§r to assign for §aall§r recipe trees
tooltip.emi.fill_recipe_no_server: Cannot Fill Recipe without EMI on server
tooltip.emi.select_resolution: Click a §6recipe's output§r to assign for §dthis§r recipe tree
tooltip.emi.set_default_stack: Press %s on an output to set default recipe for that stack
tooltip.emi.synfav.craft_some: Press %s to craft as many as possible
